goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 09:15' and should leave on 'friday'.
The train should go to 'london kings cross' and should depart from 'cambridge'.
Make sure you get 'train ID'.
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free parking' and should 'include free wifi'.
The hotel should have 'a star of 0'.
Make sure you get 'price range'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a train. The train should arrive by 09:15 and should leave on friday
The train should go to london kings cross and should depart from cambridge
Make sure you get train ID
You are also looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free parking and should include free wifi
The hotel should have a star of 0
Make sure you get price range
